---
title: "About"
---

## Citation

If you use this work, please cite:

> *Propaganda is already influencing LLMs.* (2025).

```bibtex
@article{propaganda_llms_2025,
  title={Propaganda is already influencing LLMs},
  year={2025}
}
```

## Data Sources

- **Pretraining checkpoint data**: Models fine-tuned on propaganda, state media, and CulturaX corpora, evaluated at 10 checkpoints (100–1000 steps) using GPT-4o as judge.
- **Memorization phrases**: 2,000 phrases selected via LASSO regression from propaganda and CulturaX corpora, identifying the most predictive text segments.
- **Live audit data**: Weekly automated queries to production LLMs via OpenRouter, comparing English and Chinese responses to politically sensitive prompts.

## Methodology

For full details on the experimental design, model fine-tuning procedure, and evaluation methodology, please refer to the paper.

## Contact

For questions about this research, please open an issue on the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/solomonmessing/llm_propaganda_web).
